summary: Iteration 10 — Atlas Core HUD: 7 new HUD tile panels + YouTube intake module + vibrancy pass. Backend pytest: 13/14 passed (test_iter10_hud.py). Frontend Playwright smoke: ALL 8 new tile flows pass, including the bug-fix verification that MEMORY and ARCHIVE no longer open the old .file-browser-panel popover. ONE CRITICAL BACKEND BUG found: /api/council/deliberate returns text:null for all three voices despite LiteLLM completing successfully.

critical.issue: All three voice entries return `text: null` even though LiteLLM completion logs show the 3 Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls completed with success_handler. The voices array is structurally correct (persona/display/is_lead populated, lead='hermes' for nano-swarm topic), only the text body is None. /api/chat/send using same emergentintegrations library returns proper string content, and /api/sandbox/suggest using identical with_model('anthropic','claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929') works fine — so issue appears isolated to council.deliberate. Hypothesis: _ask() return value not awaited correctly OR send_message swallowing the response when system_message is multi-line persona prompt under sequential reuse. Reproduce: curl POST /api/council/deliberate {topic:'should we deploy nano-swarms in water?'} → all voices.text == null.

minor.issue: Spec-vs-code mismatch: review request expects 'philosophy of mind' → routed_to='council', but topic_router.MINERVA_KEYWORDS contains 'philosophy', so the topic correctly routes to minerva. Either remove 'philosophy' from MINERVA_KEYWORDS or update the spec; current behaviour is consistent with the keyword lexicon.

action_items: FIX /api/council/deliberate: voices[].text is null. Compare _ask() implementation to working chat.py send_message flow; likely needs the LlmChat instance not to be re-built per-persona in a tight loop, or a missing await/return. Suggest logging raw `await chat.send_message(...)` return value before wrapping into the voices dict.
Decide on 'philosophy' keyword routing: either remove from MINERVA_KEYWORDS to satisfy the spec ('philosophy of mind' → council) or update the spec/tests to acknowledge minerva ownership.
critical_code_review_comments: council.py _ask() returns `await chat.send_message(...)` directly. If the awaited value is None the caller has no guard — wrap with `text = result if isinstance(result, str) else f'(empty response from {persona})'` so the UI never gets `text:null`.

hud_surfaces.py /settings PUT allows tts_provider/default_language/accent_theme via regex; default_language regex is `^(en|zu|yo|maa)$` which is good. voice_enabled is unbounded bool. Consider 400 (not 422) consistency with other routes.

intake.py defines `_intake_from_transcript` correctly, persists into atlas_archive — but route /api/intake/list filters by kind='youtube', so transcript-pasted lessons are NOT recoverable via that endpoint. Either widen filter or add /api/intake/list?kind=...
Both intake.py and hud_surfaces.py create their own AsyncIOMotorClient at import time. Acceptable for now but means 4 Mongo clients in process. Consider a shared db module.

topic_router.py first-match scan iterates AJANI then MINERVA then HERMES per-topic. For multi-domain topics (e.g. 'engineering and biology') AJANI always wins. Document this priority order somewhere user-facing if it matters.
test_credentials: none required (HUD is public preview, no auth)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 atlas_archive row via /api/intake/transcript with topic='robotics swarm' (TEST data — non-blocking). PUT /api/settings briefly toggled tts_provider to 'openai' then restored to 'auto'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new tile data-testids confirmed wired: ring-middle-{manual,encyclopedia,memory,customization}, ring-outer-{archive,explore}, ring-inner-trinity → opens dedicated panels (manual-panel/cyclopedia-panel/memory-panel/customization-panel/archive-browser/intake-panel/council-panel). Old .file-browser-panel popover is gone for MEMORY+ARCHIVE — verified. Council/deliberate text:null bug is the only blocker; route endpoint works fine. test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter10_hud.py (~25s incl. deliberate ~10s).
rca of the issue: Council deliberate text-null RCA: LiteLLM logs confirm 3 successful completions for claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 (provider=openai proxy). send_message() in emergentintegrations returns None for these calls but returns proper string for /api/chat/send (gpt-5.2) and /api/sandbox/suggest (claude-sonnet-4-5). Distinguishing feature of council.py: it creates a fresh LlmChat per persona in a tight sequential await loop with multi-line system_message and a session_id containing ISO timestamp + colons. Suggested fix: (a) log `raw = await chat.send_message(...)` before assignment, (b) sanitise session_id (no colons), (c) add fallback `text = raw if isinstance(raw, str) and raw.strip() else '(no response)'`.
